questions.question_html: What is the primary function of the Control Panel as described in the text?
options: To manage user accounts and security settings.
To change the computer's date and time and customize them.
To adjust network and internet settings.
questions.explanation: The text states, "Control Panel helps change your system's date and time to make sure it is accurate and synchronised. You can even customise date and time according to your preferences."

questions.question_html: In the lab session, what is the first step to change the date and time?
options: Click on the 'Date and Time' option.
Click on the 'Clock and Region' option in the Control Panel.
Click on the 'Change date and time button'.
questions.explanation: The instructions state, "Visit the lab and follow the given steps to change the date and time: Click on the Clock and Region option in the Control Panel."

questions.question_html: After clicking on the 'Clock and Region' option, which option should be selected next?
questions.explanation: The text says, "Select the Date and Time option. The Date and Time dialog box will appear."

questions.question_html: How can you change the month using the calendar in the 'Date and Time Settings' dialog box?
options: By clicking on the month name.
By using the displayed forward/backward arrow buttons.
By selecting the 'Change calendar settings' option.
questions.explanation: The text explains, "You can change the month using the displayed forward/backward arrow buttons present on the calendar."

questions.question_html: To change the hour, where should you click in the 'Date and Time Settings' dialog box?
options: In the time field located below the clock.
On the 'Change date and time' button.
questions.explanation: Under the section 'To Change Time', the instruction is to "To change the hour, select the hour in the time field located below the clock."

questions.question_html: After adjusting the hours, minutes, and seconds, what button should be clicked to apply the changes?
questions.explanation: The text states, "Click on OK. The Date and Time settings of the system will change accordingly."

Control Panel
Adjust your computer's settings
System and Security
Review your computer's status
File backup copies of your files with File History
Backup and Restore (Windows 7)
Network and Internet
View network status and tasks
Hardware and Sound
View devices and printers
Add a device
Adjust commonly used mobility settings
Programs
Uninstall a program
User Accounts
Change account type
Appearance and Personalization
Clock and Region
Change date, time, or number formats
Ease of Access
Let Windows suggest settings
Optimize visual display
Figure 1.5: Control Panel Window
Changing Date and Time
Control Panel helps change your system's date and time to make sure it is accurate and synchronised. You can even customise date and time according to your preferences.
Lab Session
Visit the lab and follow the given steps to change the date and time:
Click on the Clock and Region option in the Control Panel.
Select the Date and Time option. The Date and Time dialog box will appear.
By default, the Date and Time tab is selected.
To Change Date
Click on the Change date and time button. The Date and Time Settings dialog box will appear.
Select the current day in the calendar. You can change the month using the displayed forward/backward arrow buttons present on the calendar.
To Change Time
To change the hour, select the hour in the time field located below the clock.
Click on the spin arrows to increase or decrease the hours, as desired. Similarly, you can change the minutes and seconds. Click on OK. The Date and Time settings of the system will change accordingly.
Figure 1.6: Changing Date and Time
Figure 1.7: Date and Time Settings Dialog Box
KIPS
11

questions.question_html: Which category in Control Panel is used to change the system's date and time?
questions.explanation: According to the content, the Clock and Region option in Control Panel allows changing date and time.

questions.question_html: In the Date and Time dialog box, which tab is selected by default?
questions.explanation: The content states that by default, the Date and Time tab is selected.

questions.question_html: To change the month when setting the date, which control do you use?
questions.explanation: The content instructs to change the month using the displayed forward/backward arrow buttons on the calendar.

questions.question_html: Which of the following is NOT listed as a category in the Control Panel window?
questions.explanation: The Control Panel categories mentioned are System and Security, Network and Internet, Hardware and Sound, Programs, User Accounts, Appearance and Personalization, Clock and Region, and Ease of Access. Devices and Printers is a link under Hardware and Sound, not a category.

questions.question_html: After clicking the 'Change date and time' button, which dialog box appears?
questions.explanation: The content states: 'Click on the Change date and time button. The Date and Time Settings dialog box will appear.'

questions.question_html: Which sequence correctly shows the steps to change the system date, as described in the content?
options: Clock and Region → Date and Time → Change date and time → Select current day
Date and Time → Clock and Region → Change date and time → Select current day
Change date and time → Clock and Region → Date and Time → Select current day
Select current day → Change date and time → Date and Time → Clock and Region
questions.explanation: The content instructs: first click Clock and Region in Control Panel, then select Date and Time, then click Change date and time, then select the current day in the calendar.
